scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R src/. dist
scripts.check: cd ../.. && biome check tests/e2e/landing.spec.ts && cd apps/landing && biome check check-static.ts src/styles.css && bun run check:content
scripts.lint: cd ../.. && biome lint tests/e2e/landing.spec.ts && cd apps/landing && biome lint check-static.ts src/styles.css
